# jamfschool_app (List Resource)

Lists apps in Jamf School.

## Example Usage

```terraform
list "jamfschool_app" "example" {
  provider = jamfschool
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `name_prefix` (String) Optional name prefix filter.
